vs_b39.note: Net regression: 3 scenarios moved from I→R. S6 (word_stats_demo_multiline) and S8 (chat_compactor) likely regressed; S7 root cause changed from affordance-competition to FileNotFoundError for direct_llm/skill.md. No improvements.

scenarios.events_summary: skill_run_spawned=1, routing_decided=1(skill__index_docs), skill_run_failed=1 (unsafe python step), no skill_run_completed
scenarios.reply_excerpt: The index_docs skill encountered an error because it declared an unsafe Python step (./chunkers.py:gather_samples) and the --allow-unsafe-python flag was not provided.
scenarios.notes: Same failure as B39: index_docs requires --allow-unsafe-python flag not set in dogfood env. Consistent blocker across batches.

scenarios.events_summary: routing_decided=1(file__read hot_list_alias), no skill_run_spawned, no skill_run_completed, no read_local_files artifact
scenarios.reply_excerpt: This file defines CronJob and CronScheduler classes...
scenarios.notes: Router dispatched file__read (hot_list_alias direct action) instead of skill__read_local_files. Reply is correct content but structural events fail. Affordance-competition: file__read in hot-list wins over read_local_files skill.

scenarios.events_summary: routing_decided=21(file__list + file__read hot_list_alias), no skill_run_spawned, no skill_run_completed, no read_local_files artifact
scenarios.reply_excerpt: All files in the src/reyn/op_runtime/ directory are related to the runtime operations...
scenarios.notes: Same pattern as S2: router used file__list + 20x file__read hot_list_alias instead of skill__read_local_files. 21 routing_decided events total.

scenarios.events_summary: skill_run_spawned=1(skill_builder), routing_decided=1, workflow_aborted=1, skill_run_failed=1; 204 skill run events across 8 phases
scenarios.reply_excerpt: The model returned an empty response. Please try rephrasing your request or check your configuration.
scenarios.notes: workflow_aborted: Phase build_skill produced identical output to one rejected by verify_skill, triggering no-progress abort. Empty router reply (router_empty_response_detected). 8 phases ran before abort.

scenarios.events_summary: routing_decided=1(skill__word_stats_demo), skill_run_spawned=1, skill_run_completed(status=finished)=1, phase_started=1, llm_called=1, no permission_denied
scenarios.reply_excerpt: The word_stats_demo skill has finished processing the text. It analyzed 'The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.' and reported that the text contains 44 characters, 9 words, and an estimated 12 tokens.
scenarios.notes: Full pass: all structural events present, reply has specific computed stats (44 chars, 9 words), word_stats_demo artifact present (text_review type).

scenarios.events_summary: routing_decided=1(skill__word_stats_demo), skill_run_spawned=1, skill_run_completed(status=finished)=1; events pass but reply rubric fails
scenarios.reply_excerpt: The word_stats_demo skill has finished. It analyzed your text and provided commentary on its length and estimated token count.
scenarios.notes: Structural events pass (identical pattern to S5). Reply fails rubric: (1) no specific word count or character count mentioned, (2) says 'estimated token count' instead of referencing precomputed stats. LLM commentary was vague for multi-line input vs specific for single-line (S5). Different LLM output quality despite same skill execution path.

scenarios.events_summary: routing_decided=1(skill__eval), skill_run_spawned=1, skill_run_failed=1(PostprocessorError); tool_failed: FileNotFoundError direct_llm/skill.md
scenarios.reply_excerpt: skill__eval の実行中にエラーが発生しました。schema validation に失敗したため、結果を検証できませんでした。
scenarios.notes: DIFFERENT ROOT CAUSE vs B39: B39 was R due to direct_llm affordance competition (wrong routing). B41 R is due to eval dispatching skill__eval correctly but run_skill op inside eval failing with FileNotFoundError: 'direct_llm/skill.md' (relative path resolution from skill CWD). Then postprocessor schema validation also fails (missing overall_score, passed properties). Dual failure.

scenarios.events_summary: 5 turns of compaction_check(outcome=too_few_turns), no skill_run_spawned, no llm_called, no direct_llm artifact
scenarios.reply_excerpt: Reyn Chat におけるルーティングの仕組みについて、Universal Action Catalog、Skill Routing...
scenarios.notes: All 5 turns resolved as inline chat (chat_turn_completed_inline) with no skill dispatch. compaction_check fired each turn but always too_few_turns (threshold not reached with 5 turns of ~3KB replies). No skill_run_spawned means llm_called events absent (only tracked inside skill runs). Expected direct_llm artifact missing. Reply content is high quality but structural events fail.

scenarios.events_summary: Turn1: routing_decided=2(file__glob hot_list_alias), no skill. Turn2: skill_run_spawned=2(index_docs), skill_run_failed=2(unsafe python step)
scenarios.reply_excerpt: The index_docs skill encountered an error because it tried to run an unsafe Python step without the --allow-unsafe-python flag.
scenarios.notes: Turn 1 list via file__glob (direct action, not skill). Turn 2 attempted index_docs twice but both failed on same unsafe python step blocker as S1. Two separate skill_run_spawned + skill_run_failed pairs (run_id suffix differs: _206f and _0f11).

new_findings.title: S7 root cause changed: affordance-competition (B39) → FileNotFoundError + postprocessor schema fail (B41)
new_findings.description: B39 S7 was refuted because LLM chose direct_llm skill over eval. B41 S7 has different failure: eval was correctly dispatched (routing correct) but run_skill op inside eval fails with FileNotFoundError: 'direct_llm/skill.md'. This suggests a skill resolution path issue for run_skill when called from within another skill's phase. Separately, the postprocessor also fails schema validation (missing overall_score and passed required properties). These are two independent bugs.

new_findings.title: S6 word_stats_demo_multiline: events pass but reply degrades vs S5
new_findings.description: S5 and S6 exercise the same word_stats_demo skill with identical execution path (same events, same phases). S5 reply includes specific numbers (44 chars, 9 words). S6 reply is vague ('provided commentary on its length and estimated token count'). This suggests the LLM's commentary generation is inconsistent for multi-line vs single-line input — the python precomputed stats are available but the LLM may not be surfacing them in the reply for multi-line text.

new_findings.title: index_docs unsafe-python blocker is a systematic B41 suppressant for S1 and S9
new_findings.description: Both S1 and S9 (turn 2) fail identically: index_docs declares an unsafe python step (./chunkers.py:gather_samples) but --allow-unsafe-python was not provided. This is a persistent blocker since B39. The dogfood environment does not pass this flag. V for these scenarios requires either (a) allowing unsafe python in dogfood config, or (b) fixing index_docs to not require it.

new_findings.title: read_local_files scenarios (S2, S3) show file__ hot_list_alias dominance
new_findings.description: S2 and S3 both see the router pick file__read / file__list (hot_list_alias) over skill__read_local_files. The reply content is correct but structural events (skill_run_spawned, artifact) fail. This is the same affordance-competition pattern as previously documented — direct file ops outcompete the skill in the hot-list.
